privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new ServiceDesk Plus reply template from scratch. Verified the expected template name 'Password Reset Completion', subject 'Security Notification: Your password has been reset', required textual body strings ('Your password has been successfully reset as per your request', 'restart your computer', 'provided over the phone', 'Regards, IT Security Team'), and variable usage ('$RequesterName') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt.
